title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet overhears Vodka's pre-race
interview about her passion for the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Scarlet's own determination is renewed, and she
swears she'll beat Vodka and become number one
once more.
